---
name: Feature Request
about: Propose a new language feature or improvement
labels: enhancement
---

## Summary

A one-sentence description of the proposed change.

## Motivation

What problem does this solve? Who benefits and how?

## Proposed Syntax

If this changes or adds language syntax, show the intended form:

```
(example .lumo code using the proposed feature)
```

## Alternatives Considered

What other approaches did you consider and why did you rule them out?

## Notes

Any constraints, edge cases, or open questions relevant to this proposal.
